title: 10 best herbal creams for mucus in throat
description: Althaea officinalis, also known as marshmallow, creams helps with mucus in throat because of its soothing and protective properties. The root of the plant is rich in mucilages, a type of complex carbohydrate that forms a protective barrier on the mucous membranes. When applied topically as a cream, these mucilages help to reduce inflammation and calm irritated tissues, making it easier to cough up mucus. This natural anti-inflammatory effect also helps to break up and clear out excess ...
